---
title: "CV"
---

This page can become either a short web CV or a landing page for a downloadable PDF.

## Education

- Ph.D., Earth and Space Sciences, University of Washington
- Professional Degree, Geologist, University of Chile
- B.Sc. in Geology, University of Chile
- Academic exchange in Geosciences, Universidade de São Paulo

## Research experience

- Tectonic geomorphology, active tectonics, surface deformation, thermochronology, and landscape-evolution modeling
- Field geology, Quaternary mapping, natural hazards, and engineering geology projects in Chile

## Teaching and outreach

- University teaching and teaching assistant roles in geology and related science courses
- Technical training and bilingual programming/science communication workshops

## Materials

- [UW Symposium poster: Jesus Rangel](assets/pdf/UW_Symposium_JesusRangel.pdf)

::: {.note-box}
Add later: downloadable PDF, exact dates, current appointment, awards, publications, talks, fieldwork, service, and outreach.
:::
